2026-04-22T06:23:54.8317877Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8318862Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8319678Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8320670Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8321254Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8321698Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8321999Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8322335Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8322651Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8323086Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8323457Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8323995Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-22T06:23:54.8324483Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
